policy: Bench v4 hardness fixtures run only local deterministic tests inside repo-local tmp/ sandboxes. Model-surface runs are not simulated.

local-deterministic-grader.label: Fixture-local deterministic pytest grader
local-deterministic-grader.limitation: Execution evidence for seed artifacts, not independent model-provider evidence.

runs.title: Disabled Account Status Ambiguity
runs.hardness_axis: conflicting docstring versus caller contract

execution_result.stdout:
FF.F                                                                     [100%]
=================================== FAILURES ===================================
____________________ test_disabled_precedes_recent_activity ____________________

    def test_disabled_precedes_recent_activity():
        recent = NOW - timedelta(days=2)
        disabled = NOW - timedelta(hours=1)
>       assert classify_account(recent, disabled_at=disabled, now=NOW) == "disabled"
E       AssertionError: assert 'active' == 'disabled'
E         
E         - disabled
E         + active

check_account_status.py:12: AssertionError
______________________ test_missing_last_seen_is_unknown _______________________

    def test_missing_last_seen_is_unknown():
>       assert classify_account(None, now=NOW) == "unknown"
E       AssertionError: assert 'dormant' == 'unknown'
E         
E         - unknown
E         + dormant

check_account_status.py:16: AssertionError
________ test_naive_datetimes_are_rejected_instead_of_silently_guessed _________

    def test_naive_datetimes_are_rejected_instead_of_silently_guessed():
        naive = datetime(2026, 7, 1, 12, 0)
        try:
>           classify_account(naive, now=NOW)

check_account_status.py:27: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

last_seen_at = datetime.datetime(2026, 7, 1, 12, 0), disabled_at = None
now = datetime.datetime(2026, 7, 2, 12, 0, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc)

    def classify_account(last_seen_at, disabled_at=None, now=None):
        """Return active when the account was seen within the last 30 days."""
        now = now or datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        if last_seen_at is None:
            return "dormant"
>       if now - last_seen_at <= timedelta(days=30):
E       TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes

hidden-invariant-event-order.title: Event Deduplication Hidden Order Invariant
hidden-invariant-event-order.hardness_axis: order and replay semantics hidden behind simple dedupe wording

runs.title: Event Deduplication Hidden Order Invariant
runs.hardness_axis: order and replay semantics hidden behind simple dedupe wording

execution_result.stdout:
F.F                                                                      [100%]
=================================== FAILURES ===================================
_____ test_preserves_first_seen_order_and_timestamp_while_merging_payloads _____

    def test_preserves_first_seen_order_and_timestamp_while_merging_payloads():
        events = [
            {"id": "b", "timestamp": "2026-07-02T10:00:00Z", "payload": {"count": 1, "note": None}},
            {"id": "a", "timestamp": "2026-07-02T10:01:00Z", "payload": {"count": 2}},
            {"id": "b", "timestamp": "2026-07-02T10:02:00Z", "payload": {"note": "kept", "flag": True}},
        ]
        result = dedupe_events(events)
>       assert [event["id"] for event in result] == ["b", "a"]
E       AssertionError: assert ['a', 'b'] == ['b', 'a']
E         
E         At index 0 diff: 'a' != 'b'
E         Use -v to get more diff

check_events.py:13: AssertionError
___________ test_rejects_missing_id_instead_of_collapsing_into_none ____________

    def test_rejects_missing_id_instead_of_collapsing_into_none():
        try:
            dedupe_events([{"timestamp": "2026-07-02T10:00:00Z", "payload": {}}])
        except ValueError as exc:
            assert "id" in str(exc)
        else:
>           raise AssertionError("events without id must be rejected")
E           AssertionError: events without id must be rejected

check_events.py:34: AssertionError
=========================== short test summary info ============================
FAILED check_events.py::test_preserves_first_seen_order_and_timestamp_while_merging_payloads
FAILED check_events.py::test_rejects_missing_id_instead_of_collapsing_into_none
